name: Albert David Limited
summary: Albert David Limited manufactures and sells pharmaceutical formulations, infusion solutions, herbal dosage forms, bulk drugs, and disposable syringes and needles in India. It offers formulations for parenteral, oral/enteral, topical agents, and vision care problems. The company also exports its products to Latin American, South East Asian, and various African countries. Albert David Limited was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
